---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an addition or change
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature-request
assignees: ''

---

*If your request is not too complicated, please add it to the [feature request discussion thread](https://github.com/DesertCookie/indie-film-assistant/discussions/1) instead!*

**What feature is missing?**
*Add a clear and concise description of what you think is missing. E.g.: `It should be possible to view details about a costume by clicking on it`.

**Why is the feature important?**
*Briefly explain why you think this feature is important to you and how it would improve IFA. E.g.: `Moving some of the information in the costume list view into a detail view would declutter the list and make it easier to work with`.*

**How to implement the feature?**
*If possible, describe how you would implement the feature. E.g.: `A little popup could open when the user clicks on an item in the list view that allows one to view and edit the details of that costume`.*

**Additional context**
*Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. E.g.: `Here is a scribble of how the detail view could look like: 🖼`.*
